name: DraggonnB - CRM Engagement Score (Nightly)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ organization_id: $json.organization_id, card_type: $json.card_type, entity_type: $json.entity_type, entity_id: $json.entity_id, score: $json.score, score_breakdown: $json.score_breakdown, refreshed_at: $json.refreshed_at, n8n_run_id: $execution.id }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_OPS_CHAT_ID, text: '[CRM Engagement Score Failed]
Org: ' + ($node['Split CRM Orgs'].json?.organization_id || 'unknown') + '
Run ID: ' + $execution.id + '
Error: ' + ($json.message || JSON.stringify($json)) + '
Timestamp: ' + new Date().toISOString(), parse_mode: 'HTML' }) }}
